data.title: MicroCloud Hologram Inc. invests $200M in Bitcoin & cryptocurrency, with $34.67M in income; July 17, 2025.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, MicroCloud Hologram Inc. (NASDAQ: HOLO), a tech company based in Shenzhen, China, revealed their acquisition of approximately $200 million worth of Bitcoin and cryptocurrency-related securities derivatives. This move signifies the company's strategic investment in the digital asset market.
Liberty increases equity financing to C$4.4 million due to high demand.

data.title: Johnson & Johnson beats EPS forecast, raising cautious optimism on Wall Street despite mixed reviews from analysts.
data.description: Shares of Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ) are facing downward pressure despite a robust second-quarter earnings report. Analysts have taken notice, with BofA Securities analyst Tim Anderson maintaining a Neutral rating but increasing the price target to $175 from $161. Similarly, Guggenheim Securities analyst Vamil Divan kept a Neutral rating while boosting the price target from $164 to $167. On the other hand, RBC Capital Markets analyst Shagun Singh stuck with an Outperform rating and raised the price target from $181 to $185. BofA Securities highlighted that Johnson & Johnson's earnings exceeded consensus by 3%, noting that the company's operational efficiency was somewhat affected by higher taxes. Overall, the company had a strong quarter and heightened performance. For more details, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Château Galoupet reveals new brand home and introduces latest cuvée; owned by Moët Hennessy, part of LVMH.
data.description: In July 2025, Château Galoupet, a renowned Cru Classé under the esteemed Côtes-de-Provence label and part of Moët Hennessy, the wine and spirits branch of LVMH, has introduced a new public area. This expansion showcases a natural setting for visitors to immerse themselves in the rich history of the estate.

data.title: Sogeclair: Voting rights update for 2025/06/30, with a capital of 3,204,901 Euros and headquarters in France.
data.description: Sogéclair, a business corporation based in Blagnac, France, operates with a capital of 3,204,901 Euros. The company can be contacted at their head office located at 7 Avenue Albert Durand or by phone at +33 (0)5.61.71.71.71. For more information, visit www.sogeclair.com. Sogéclair is registered under the number 335 218 269 with the RCS Toulouse.

data.title: CIOs and IT leaders need to adapt faster to keep up with tech disruption as core responsibilities shift every 18 months.
data.description: In the rapidly changing landscape, CIOs and technology leaders face the challenge of adapting to new core IT responsibilities every 18 months or less. This puts immense pressure on them to keep pace with the accelerating technology advancements, which are evolving exponentially.

data.title: High-Bandwidth Memory Chips Market projected to reach USD 139.45 billion by 2031 with 68.2% CAGR growth.
data.description: In Bangalore, India, on July 17, 2025, the High-Bandwidth Memory Chips Market report was released. The market is segmented by type into HBM2, HBM2E, HBM3, HBM3E, and Others, and by application into Servers, Networking Products, Consumer Products, and Others. This report provides a Global Opportunity Analysis and Industry Forecast for the period 2024-2031. The global market for high-bandwidth memory chips is projected to experience significant growth during this forecast period.

data.title: IQM launches Power Segments, using proximity to target lawmakers and staff, latest media platform. NY, July 17, 2025.
data.description: A recent development utilizes the impact of proximity to sway legislators, their aides, and their core associates. The IQM Advertising Corporation, a renowned global media buying platform, has introduced a new method to engage lawmakers and key stakeholders effectively. This initiative aims to target individuals in close proximity to lawmakers, aiding advertisers in highly regulated sectors to connect with key decision-makers. The tactic leverages the influence of proximity to enhance engagement with lawmakers and their inner circles. This innovative approach, launched in New York on July 17, 2025, demonstrates a fresh strategy for advertisers seeking to interact with influential figures.

data.title: SonicWall names Rajnish Mishra as Chief Development Officer to bolster security portfolio for MSPs and MSSPs.
data.description: SonicWall, based in Milpitas, California, recently appointed Rajnish Mishra as their new Senior Vice President and Chief Development Officer with a focus on enhancing the company's network and cloud strategies for Managed Service Providers (MSPs) and Managed Security Service Providers (MSSPs). This addition aims to accelerate SonicWall's advancements in the cloud sector. The announcement was made on July 17, 2025.

data.title: FDA grants marketing authorizations to JUUL System with over 110 scientific studies submitted as part of 2020 applications.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) approved marketing granted orders (MGOs) for the JUUL System. To support its 2020 applications, more than 110 scientific studies were submitted to the FDA, encompassing nonclinical, clinical, and behavioral research.

data.title: Work progressing on Mont Sorcier Iron/Vanadium project near Chibougamau, Quebec. Cerrado Gold Inc. shares update, no specific numbers mentioned.
data.description: Chibougamau Independent Mines Inc. provided an update on the Mont Sorcier Iron/vanadium project near Chibougamau, Quebec. Cerrado Gold Inc. released a statement outlining the progress at the project. Chibougamau, listed as CBG-TSX-V in Canada, CLL1-Frankfurt, Stuttgart, Berlin, and Lang & Schwarz Stock Exchanges in Germany, CMAUF-OTC in the US, shared the information with shareholders. The project is situated close to the town of Chibougamau. The details were made public on July 17, 2025.

data.title: "Report predicts shared mobility revenue to exceed $900 billion by 2025, highlighting regulations, investments, and trends."
data.description: In Dublin, the "Shared Mobility Predictions and Outlook, 2025" report is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report forecasts that the total revenue potential from shared mobility will exceed $900 billion by 2025. It discusses significant regulations, funding, investments, and key trends shaping the industry in that year. data.title: ZA Miner, a cloud mining platform, expands global capacity as Bitcoin reaches $118,000 and XRP, Ethereum gain traction.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in London, the digital asset market has seen a resurgence, highlighted by Bitcoin surpassing $118,000 in value. XRP and Ethereum have also shown increased popularity. To address the growing user interest, ZA Miner, an AI-driven cloud mining platform, has revealed its plans to expand its global capacity. This expansion aims to accommodate the rising demand from users in the digital market.

data.title: SolidRun & Amarisoft launch 5G Base Stations on embedded x86 platform, utilizing AMD Ryzen Embedded V3000 CoM.
data.description: A high-performance and versatile solution driven by SolidRun's AMD Ryzen Embedded V3000 CoM and HoneyComb platform is enhancing edge, private, and tactical 5G networks. This compact carrier-grade technology from Tel Aviv, Israel brings a new level of efficiency to these networks. The solution is set to boost performance with cutting-edge capabilities.

data.title: FlexiSpot's Japanese Joinery Bed awarded Best Wooden Bed Frame of 2025 by Expert Consumers, valued for modern design.
data.description: In a recent report released on July 17, 2025, Expert Consumers declared the FlexiSpot Japanese Joinery Bed as one of the top Wooden Bed Frames of the year. data.title: L3Harris and Arkansas Gov. announce $500M investment in solid rocket motor production campus in Camden.
data.description: In Camden, Arkansas, L3Harris Technologies, listed on NYSE as LHX, revealed a partnership with Arkansas Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders to establish a significant large solid rocket motor (LSRM) production facility at their Camden premises. The company is allocating around $500 million towards enhancing solid rocket motor production at its primary manufacturing locations. With a focus on strengthening the domestic solid rocket motor industrial base, Arkansas was chosen by L3Harris due to its committed workforce and conducive business environment.

data.title: Dow Jones surged on surprise economic data - jobless claims and retail sales, Nvidia chipmaker TSMC's rise - Live coverage.
data.description: The Dow Jones index experienced a notable increase on Thursday due to unexpected decreases in jobless claims and positive retail sales figures. The chipmaker Nvidia saw an uptick as well, with TSMC's earnings driving this growth. Overall, the stock market exhibited a positive trend for the day, with the Dow climbing. Additionally, Netflix showed a promising movement as it gears up for its upcoming earnings report. This live coverage highlights the events that contributed to these shifts in the market.
